rules.condition_select: PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/building#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> SELECT ?zone ?setpoint WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "OccupantSetpointRequest" ; <urn:prop:zone> ?zone . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?zone a ex:HVAC_Zone ; ex:currentSetpoint ?setpoint . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/building#> SELECT ?zone ?setpoint WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "DemandResponsePeak" ; <urn:prop:zone> ?zone . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?zone a ex:HVAC_Zone ; ex:currentSetpoint ?setpoint . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/building#> SELECT ?zone ?mode WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "CO2Spike" ; <urn:prop:zone> ?zone . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?zone a ex:HVAC_Zone ; ex:ventilationMode ?mode . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/building#> SELECT ?zone ?setpoint WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "OccupancyDetected" ; <urn:prop:zone> ?zone . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?zone a ex:HVAC_Zone ; ex:currentSetpoint ?setpoint ; ex:occupied false . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/building#> SELECT ?zone ?state WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "EmergencyAlarm" ; <urn:prop:zone> ?zone . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?zone a ex:HVAC_Zone ; ex:emergencyState ?state . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/building#> SELECT ?zone ?mode WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "EmergencyAlarm" ; <urn:prop:zone> ?zone . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?zone a ex:HVAC_Zone ; ex:ventilationMode ?mode . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/building#> SELECT ?zone ?setpoint WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "PreheatRequest" ; <urn:prop:zone> ?zone . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?zone a ex:HVAC_Zone ; ex:currentSetpoint ?setpoint . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/building#> SELECT ?zone ?mode WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "DemandResponsePeak" ; <urn:prop:zone> ?zone . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?zone a ex:HVAC_Zone ; ex:ventilationMode ?mode . } }
